verifyStep.scope: Repository text files covered by the encoding guardrail

attempts.failureReason: check_encoding.ps1 reported a text file that did not satisfy UTF-8 without BOM requirements.

repairAction.summary: Normalize the affected file to UTF-8 without BOM while preserving content semantics.

attempts.notes: Repair was applied. The next action is to rerun check_encoding.ps1 before claiming completion.
